title: CRM Template - Monthly goal display not working. Help!

posts.author: ricklees (Rick Lees)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love Monday, but it isn’t quite working for me at the moment.

One of my main gripes is that in the CRM template, the monthly goal section doesn’t seem to work.

It adds up the value of all time deals, not just that specific month.

Does anyone know how to fix this? It should be easy…

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ricklees

Seems I’m running into you all over the place! Sounds like you could use a hand with an ideal set up - send me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or book straight into my calendar with the below link and we can talk about your use case and your options.

Chat with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream
